chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1005 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.10103/25. 26.12.2025. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***************************************** Through listed application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 01.09.2025, the applicants/accused Muhammad Sharif and Ghulam Rasool were granted protective bail by this Court for a period of five days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. The applicant has produced on record information regarding only one of the accused namely Ghulam Rasool s/o Kando, by case Lund who presented himself before the concerned Court but no information is available with regard to the co- accused (Muhammad Sharif). Further it appears that although Ghulam Rasool had submitted himself before the concerned Court but did not do so within time granted by this Court. Learned D.P.G after going through the record tendered his no objection for return of surety only to the extent of accused Ghulm Rasool. As an indulgence, time excluded is condoned and office is directed to released / return the surety to applicant/surety in respect of accused Ghulam Rasool only. The listed application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali.
